# Templeman Opticians — Independent eyecare in Rayleigh, Essex
# https://templeman-opticians.com
# Updated: 2026-05-21
# Maintained for AI crawlers, agents, and answer-engine citations.

## About

Templeman Opticians is a family-run optical practice based in Rayleigh, Essex,
serving the wider Essex region with eye tests, glasses, glasses repairs, and
home eye tests. We also visit care homes across Essex for residents who cannot
travel.

- Phone: 01268 777729
- Location: Rayleigh, Essex (United Kingdom)
- Coverage: Rayleigh, Hockley, Rochford, Southend-on-Sea, Basildon,
  Wickford, Chelmsford, Brentwood, Romford, and surrounding Essex towns.
- Services:
  - NHS-funded and private eye examinations
  - Prescription glasses (new + repairs)
  - Sunglasses and reading glasses
  - Home eye tests (housebound, elderly, post-op patients)
  - Care-home eye-test visits across Essex
  - Children's eye tests
  - Adjustments and minor repairs while-you-wait
  - Spectacle replacements

## Contact

- Phone: 01268 777729
- Callback form on the website
- Email: nicholastempleman@gmail.com (forwarding to Templeman Opticians)
